channel.title: BABA — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on BABA (Alibaba) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BABA (+30%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BABA in Q4 2025 · 28.4% of portfolio. Doubling down again on the Alibaba contrarian bet.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED BABA (+30%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added BABA in Q4 2025 · 5.4% of portfolio. Adding to China contrarian bet.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BABA (+40%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BABA in Q3 2025 · 21.3% of portfolio. Doubled the Alibaba bet.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)

item.title: Li Lu: TRIMMED BABA (-12%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) trimmed BABA in Q3 2025 · 9.7% of portfolio. Took some Alibaba profits.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Li Lu)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED BABA (-7%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed BABA in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: David Tepper: NEW POSITION BABA · Q3 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) new position BABA in Q3 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio. New Alibaba position — China contrarian.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED BABA (-75%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed BABA in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BABA (+35%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BABA in Q2 2025 · 15.2% of portfolio. First major BABA add — 3 Q consecutive.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED BABA (+28%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added BABA in Q1 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION BABA · Q1 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position BABA in Q1 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Burry re-entered BABA here.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)

item.title: Michael Burry: ADDED BABA (+30%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) added BABA in Q4 2024 · 11.5% of portfolio. BABA contrarian build accelerating.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)

item.title: David Tepper: NEW POSITION BABA · Q4 2024
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) new position BABA in Q4 2024 · 3.4% of portfolio. First BABA position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED BABA (-32%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed BABA in Q3 2024 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION BABA · Q3 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position BABA in Q3 2024 · 8.5% of portfolio. Burry's BABA re-entry.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED BABA (+8%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added BABA in Q2 2024 · 0.3% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Michael Burry: EXITED BABA · Q2 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) exited BABA in Q2 2024. Briefly exited BABA before re-entering Q3.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)

item.title: Michael Burry: NEW POSITION BABA · Q1 2024
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) new position BABA in Q1 2024 · 6.0% of portfolio. First BABA contrarian position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)
